name: gather-profile
title: Gather Team Member Profile
description: Child workflow spawned once per team member by kaggle-competition-coordinator. Collects the member's self-reported strengths, weaknesses, interests, and current load via a human form assigned directly to them.
preamble:
## Domain Context
One run per team member. The member fills in their own profile so the parent workflow can match competitions to the team and pick a best-fit reviewer. The task is pre-assigned to the member via the userId carried in the spawn payload.

triggerInput.name: userId
triggerInput.description: User id of the member this profile is for (sets the task assignee)

triggerInput.name: email
triggerInput.description: Member email, echoed for the parent's collection step

steps.name: Provide your profile
steps.description: Share your strengths, weaknesses, interests, and current load so the team can match competitions and assign a reviewer.

params.name: strengths
params.description: Skills and areas you are strong in (e.g. NLP, feature engineering, MLOps)

params.name: weaknesses
params.description: Areas you are less comfortable with or want to avoid

params.name: interests
params.description: Topics and competition domains that interest you

params.name: currentLoad
params.description: Your current workload / availability for this competition
